svg.text: 1. Inline SVG – Arrow markers on path
2. Inline SVG – Markers on polyline (start + mid + end)
3. Inline SVG – Marker on polygon vertices
4. ViewBox scaling – large viewBox in small viewport
5. ViewBox scaling – small viewBox in large viewport
7. Varying stroke widths with same marker
10. SVG with markers as CSS background-image
11. Curved path with marker-start and marker-end
12. Multiple paths sharing markers in scaled viewBox
